intent_alignment.summary: Tests cover sessionKey creation, currentSessionId generation updates, stale sessionId rejection, includeSelf list behavior, exact alias search ranking, alias update broadcast, startup reconcile, and legacy tab backfill.

tech_quality.summary: Tests use deterministic in-memory contract inputs and assertions; no implementation files or external services are modified.

req_mapping.summary: All 13 sidecar test symbols for FR-MCP-001 and FR-MCP-006 are registered in server/src/test-runner.ts.

red_verification.summary: Expected RED: 13 failures from missing MCP session registry/alias contract implementation.
